ddls:
CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the category the product belongs to */,
  "purchase_price" TEXT /* Price at which the product is purchased */,
  "selling_price" TEXT /* Price at which the product is sold */,
  "product_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the product */,
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the brand of the product */,
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the supplier of the product */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the product is active */,
  "product_image_url" TEXT /* URL to the product image */,
  "reorder_level" INTEGER /* Minimum stock level to trigger a reorder */,
  "reorder_quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity to reorder when stock falls below the reorder level */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the parent category */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the category is active */,
  "category_image_url" TEXT /* URL to the category image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory record */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product */,
  "store_id" INTEGER /* ID of the store */,
  "qty_in_stock" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product in stock */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the inventory was last updated */,
  "reorder_date" TEXT /* Date when the product was last reordered */,
  "last_inventory_check_date" TEXT /* Date when the inventory was last physically checked */,
  "is_on_hold" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the inventory is on hold */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_store_id FOREIGN KEY ("store_id") REFERENCES stores ("store_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stores" (
  "store_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each store */,
  "store_name" TEXT /* Name of the store */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the store */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the store */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the manager of the store */,
  "store_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the store */,
  "store_image_url" TEXT /* URL to the store image */,
  "store_opening_date" TEXT /* Date when the store opened */,
  "store_status" TEXT /* Status of the store (e.g., open, closed, under renovation) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("store_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales" (
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sale transaction */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product sold */,
  "store_id" INTEGER /* ID of the store where the sale occurred */,
  "qty_sold" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product sold */,
  "sale_date" TEXT /* Date when the sale occurred */,
  "sale_price" TEXT /* Price at which the product was sold */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer who made the purchase */,
  "discount_amount" TEXT /* Amount of discount applied to the sale */,
  "tax_amount" TEXT /* Amount of tax applied to the sale */,
  "total_amount" TEXT /* Total amount of the sale including tax and discount */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment (e.g., cash, credit card, debit card) */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the employee who processed the sale */,
  "is_returned" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the sale was returned */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sale_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_store_id FOREIGN KEY ("store_id") REFERENCES stores ("store_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "monthly_sales" (
  "monthly_sale_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each monthly sales record */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product */,
  "store_id" INTEGER /* ID of the store */,
  "month" TEXT /* Month for which the sales are recorded */,
  "year" TEXT /* Year for which the sales are recorded */,
  "qty_sold" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product sold */,
  "total_sales" TEXT /* Total sales revenue for the product */,
  "discount_amount" TEXT /* Total discount amount for the month */,
  "tax_amount" TEXT /* Total tax amount for the month */,
  "total_revenue" TEXT /* Total revenue for the month including tax and discount */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("monthly_sale_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_monthly_sales_store_id FOREIGN KEY ("store_id") REFERENCES stores ("store_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_monthly_sales_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "price_history" (
  "price_history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each price history record */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the price period */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the price period */,
  "purchase_price" TEXT /* Purchase price during the period */,
  "selling_price" TEXT /* Selling price during the period */,
  "price_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the price change */,
  "price_change_percentage" TEXT /* Percentage change in price */,
  "is_promotion" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the price change was due to a promotion */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("price_history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_price_history_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., manager, staff, admin) */,
  "store_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the store the user is associated with */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the user account is active */,
  "is_admin" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the user has admin privileges */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_store_id FOREIGN KEY ("store_id") REFERENCES stores ("store_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the system was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., login, inventory update, sales report) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access occurred */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for access */,
  "access_details" TEXT /* Additional details about the access event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
